message:
refactor: remove done.go restore stubs and stale BD_BRANCH comments

Remove the 5 no-op `restore := func() {}` / `restore()` call pairs in
done.go that were left as scaffolding when BD_BRANCH injection was
removed. Also delete the onMainBranch TODO comment and simplify a
stale comment in sling_helpers.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
